card_description: Protestant Reformers is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick identifies the "Holy Spirit" as a collective immortal Light Body that re-entered him to stimulate his "Third Soul" (Aristotelian/immortal)."
